headline: 痴迷领跑，小黄人回归，暑期档激战正酣
headlineEn: Obsession Leads, Minions Return, Summer Box Office Heats Up
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：痴迷持续火爆，末日地堡与福尔摩斯小姐3热度攀升。本周新片包括穿普拉达的女王2等。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Obsession remains hot, Silo and Enola Holmes 3 trending up. New films this week include The Devil Wears Prada 2 and more.

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，但本周新片阵容强劲。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but a strong slate of new films this week.

industryHighlights.text: 痴迷连续多日登顶热搜，口碑持续发酵。
industryHighlights.en: Obsession tops trending for multiple days, word-of-mouth growing.

industryHighlights.text: 穿普拉达的女王2本周上映引发怀旧热潮。
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 releases this week, sparking nostalgia.

industryHighlights.text: 超级少女与玩具总动员5备受期待，预告片热度高。
industryHighlights.en: Supergirl and Toy Story 5 highly anticipated, trailers trending.
